docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $400.00 FILED BY ELBARCHOMY MAHMOUD AFIFI AS TO DEFENDANT BOVAIRD JOSIE VIEDE FRANCE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-04-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
